ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-16-2014 IN 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(A), (D). HEARING HELD. THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING RULING: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(A), (D) IS GRANTED. TRIAL IS SEPTEMBER 15, 2014 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 503. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON 9/11/14. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON 8/27/14 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT. 503. THERE WILL BE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULES OF COURT RULE 5 ON 9/15/14 AT 1:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 503. (SEE CLERK'S MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS OF RULING.) COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: TARA A. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties James Kraemer and Carol Kraemer
Andrew M. Minear of SCHIFF HARDIN LLP (415-901-8785), appearing for defendant / responding party Owens-Illinois, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(A), (D)

Hearing held. The Court made the following ruling: Plaintiffs' motion for preference pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a), (d) is granted. Trial is September 15, 2014 at 11:15am in Department 503. The 120th day is November 13, 2014. Last day for hearing summary motions is September 11, 2014. Plaintiffs have stipulated to shortened notice for summary motions. Summary motions may be brought on 15 days notice, with oppositions due on 9/2/14 and replies due on 9/8/14. Electronic Service is considered the equivalent of personal service. Time to respond to written contention discovery is shortened to 15 days. Plaintiffs must be produced to deposition no later than 8/8/14. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on all defendants no later than 7/25/14. Responses to the demand are due no later than 8/1/14. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on 9/11/14.
Fact discovery cut-off date 9/12/14. Expert discovery cut off is 9/12/14. No later than 8/1/14, plaintiff must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiff's claims. No later than 8/1/14, defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown.
Further case management conference on 8/27/14 at 1:30pm in Dept. 503. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. Plaintiffs' counsel to notify the Court the Monday before if this conference is not needed. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on 9/15/14 at 1:30pm in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by 9/11/14 at 2:00pm. Counsel for plaintiffs to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Tara A. Lohman of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13428 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
